text:
ven though a Brahmin by birth will on
account of his preceptors teaching become a king, or equal to a king.
With Jupiter and Venus in the 4th the native will win all his enemies, will be endowed with
relatives, friends, conveyances, wealth and will honour the Almighty and Brahmins.
With Jupiter and Venus in the 7th, one will acquire a virtuous female, be endowed with precious
stones and riches, will acquire happiness, fame and female issue and will procure excellent
conveyances and enjoy pleasures.
With Jupiter and Venus in the 10th, he will widely command, be widely honoured and endowed,
wide riches, be a king, will have many servants and be virtuous.
79-82. JUPITER-SATURN IN CONJUNCTION IN ANGLES.
If Saturn and Jupiter are together in the Ascendant at birth, the native will be languid with passion
(or intoxication), hard-hearted, is of a noble descent, learned, rich, will have limited happiness
and be wicked.
